description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the harkishen/mindtheword_ci_image_fedora Docker image with a single stage called build. Add a job named build that runs in the build stage and executes the following script commands in order: node -v && npm -v; npm install -g prettier; prettier --check -- lib/assets/js/main.js lib/scripts/**/*.js test/**/*.js; npm install -g gulp jspm minimatch@3.0.2; chromium-browser -version; npm install; jspm install bootstrap=npm:bootstrap; jspm install; npm install gulp; gulp build; npm install -g selenium-webdriver mocha mochawesome; npm install chromedriver@2.46 chromium mocha selenium-webdriver; xvfb-run -s "-screen 0 1920x1080x16" -a npm test. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
